qualitative_assessment: MP Lavu Sri Krishna Devarayalu shows a mixed transparency profile with significant gaps in key areas. While maintaining a clean criminal record and good attendance, the MP demonstrates poor performance in committee participation, accessibility to constituents, and legislative contributions. The moderate MPLADS and assets disclosure scores, combined with zero scores in committee and legislative work, indicate limited transparency in core parliamentary functions.
key_finding: Mixed profile with clean record but poor committee & legislative transparency
